title: Protect my eyes
description: This is a mod that adds a border to commonly used blocks, making it easier to count slots for building construction.
body:
Add squares to protect your eyes.护眼大补丸给常用方块添加边框，使得数格子时候不会瞎眼。
![网格](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d18c8a224096614aa7b0fc71079382d0199228.png)
This is a mod that adds a border to commonly used blocks, making it easier to count slots for building construction.
